name: Duran, Dynasty of Running Wolves
description: When an ally character uses a Follow-Up ATK, the wearer gains 1 stack of "Merit," stacking up to 5 times. Each stack of "Merit" increases the DMG dealt by the wearer's Follow-Up ATKs by 5%. When there are 5 stacks, additionally increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 25%.

pieces2.description: When an ally character uses a Follow-Up ATK, the wearer gains 1 stack of "Merit," stacking up to 5 times.

pieces4.description: Each stack of "Merit" increases the DMG dealt by the wearer's Follow-Up ATKs by 5%. When there are 5 stacks, additionally increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 25%.
